# Recreate this 21st.dev component

You are implementing a React component based on a public 21st.dev community component.

## Component identity

- Source page: https://21st.dev/community/components/cloudflypeng/music-card/music-card
- Registry URL: https://21st.dev/r/cloudflypeng/music-card
- Author: cloudflypeng
- Component slug: music-card
- Demo slug: music-card
- Title: music-card
- Description: 
- Registry status: Registry fetch failed from https://21st.dev/r/cloudflypeng/music-card with status 403. Error: {"error":"Authentication required"}
- Local rendered HTML file: generated-21st-prompts/rendered-html/cloudflypeng__music-card__music-card.html
- Local screenshot file: generated-21st-prompts/screenshots/cloudflypeng__music-card__music-card.png

## Goal

Recreate this component in a React + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS project. Preserve the visual layout, spacing, colors, border radius, shadows, interaction behavior, animation behavior, responsive behavior, and dark mode behavior shown in the rendered demo.

## Implementation requirements

- Use React and TypeScript.
- Use Tailwind CSS classes whenever possible.
- Keep the component self-contained unless the source files require helper components.
- If the source uses CSS variables, custom CSS, animations, or keyframes, include them.
- If the source uses external packages, list and use the required packages.
- Preserve accessibility attributes, button semantics, links, keyboard behavior, and ARIA attributes when visible in the source.
- Do not replace the component with a simplified placeholder.
- Return complete production-ready code.

## Dependencies

No registry metadata available.

## Rendered DOM snapshot

This is the rendered demo HTML extracted from the live preview. Use it to verify structure, class names, visible content, and layout.

```html
<div id="root"><div class="relative flex items-center justify-center h-screen w-full m-auto p-16 bg-background text-foreground"><div class="absolute lab-bg inset-0 size-full"><div class="absolute inset-0 bg-[radial-gradient(#00000021_1px,transparent_1px)] dark:bg-[radial-gradient(#ffffff22_1px,transparent_1px)]"></div></div><div class="flex w-full justify-center relative"><section class="w-[20rem] bg-white/10 dark:bg-black/20 backdrop-blur-md rounded-xl p-4 
        shadow-xl hover:shadow-2xl transition-all duration-300 
        hover:bg-white/20 dark:hover:bg-black/30" style="--main-color: #eab308; --hover-color: #eab30833;"><div class="relative w-full aspect-square mb-4 rounded-lg overflow-hidden group bg-gray-100"><img alt="music poster" class="w-full h-full object-cover transition-transform duration-300 group-hover:scale-110" src="data:image/jpeg;base64,"></div><div class="mb-4 px-2"><h3 class="text-lg font-semibold text-gray-800 dark:text-gray-100 truncate">稻香</h3><p class="text-sm text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400 truncate">周杰伦</p></div><div class="mb-4 px-2"><div class="h-1 bg-gray-200 dark:bg-gray-700 rounded-full cursor-pointer group"><div class="h-full bg-[var(--main-color)] rounded-full relative" style="width: 0%;"><div class="absolute right-0 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-3 h-3 
              bg-[var(--main-color)] rounded-full shadow-md transform scale-0 
              group-hover:scale-100 transition-transform"></div></div></div><div class="flex justify-between mt-1 text-xs text-gray-500 dark:text-gray-400"><span>0:00</span><span>3:43</span></div></div><div class="flex items-center justify-between px-4"><button class="p-2 text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400 
            hover:text-[var(--main-color)] dark:hover:text-[var(--main-color)] 
            transition-colors" title="后退 10 秒"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-skip-back w-6 h-6" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M17.971 4.285A2 2 0 0 1 21 6v12a2 2 0 0 1-3.029 1.715l-9.997-5.998a2 2 0 0 1-.003-3.432z"></path><path d="M3 20V4"></path></svg></button><button class="p-2 text-[var(--main-color)] hover:opacity-80 transition-colors"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-circle-play w-8 h-8" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M9 9.003a1 1 0 0 1 1.517-.859l4.997 2.997a1 1 0 0 1 0 1.718l-4.997 2.997A1 1 0 0 1 9 14.996z"></path><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"></circle></svg></button><button class="p-2 text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400 
            hover:text-[var(--main-color)] dark:hover:text-[var(--main-color)] 
            transition-colors" title="前进 10 秒"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-skip-forward w-6 h-6" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M21 4v16"></path><path d="M6.029 4.285A2 2 0 0 0 3 6v12a2 2 0 0 0 3.029 1.715l9.997-5.998a2 2 0 0 0 .003-3.432z"></path></svg></button></div></section></div></div></div>
```
